info.name: File Drop Batch
info.summary: Bulk-create file drop folders and links for theatre/event sessions - from a CSV, entered manually, or synced live from a Google Sheet
info.description: Build a show from a CSV of Theatre/Date/Start Time/Presenter Name/Presenter Email rows, by entering sessions directly in the browser, or by linking a Google Sheet that stays synced automatically. Each session gets a nested folder, an upload-only "file drop" public share link (with a single expiry date/time applied to the whole batch), and an email to its presenter with the link; a copy of the CSV with the file drop link added can be downloaded afterwards. Optionally also creates shared root folders (Holding slides, fonts, schedules, all show, plus custom names) and a Nextcloud account per distinct theatre, scoped to its own theatre folder and the shared root folders. Every session (from a CSV, added manually, or synced from a Google Sheet) is tracked in a Sessions list where it can be edited, closed early, or removed - and a session synced from a Google Sheet is automatically closed the moment its row disappears from that sheet. Can also automatically mirror the whole base folder to a separate Nextcloud instance via rclone over WebDAV once a batch's file-drop links have expired, for replicating collected files to a server taken to the event site.
info.author: Allan Sargeant
